calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, December 17, 2015, in Department 525:
Jarvis Murray, Legal Affairs of SFMTA, CCSF,(415) 701-5434, appears for Respondent/Plaintiff San Francisco Tax Collector-Investigations..
Rajesh Kumar, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Mr. Murray testifies on behalf of SF Tax Collector-Investigations and responds to the questions from the Court.

Mr. Kumar testifies on his own behalf by reading his written statement and responds to the questions from the Court. Not marked exhibit - Mr. Kumar's written statement.

Mr. Murray informs the Court that SFMTA is still willing to accept $500 from Mr. Kumar for his citation today as they had originally agreed on. Mr. Kumar stated in open court that he is willing to pay the $500 today.

Matter is submitted. Mr. Kumar's written statement is returned to Mr. Kumar by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Deborah Daniloff; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Judgment Entered
